title: AniTexLib
description: Tired of static textures? Alive them!
body:
![Titile](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_efafea1e-1caf-4823-94c8-01dddb15380b.gif)


# AnitexLib:

A light-weight library mod providing API for animations of mobs' textures

## Providing API

Provides flexible json based animation parser based on each separeted frame with configurable interval of textures' change.
Also provide dynamic texture changer due to condtion when to stop, on what frame to stop, and new configurable particle types.

## API - how to use


<details>
<summary>Video of usage</summary>

Video of library usage:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pO4Hz0gmjqg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



 

AnitexLib support Minecraft 1.19+ with using its systems to manage json controllers of animations, that have to be create(with static animator) or generates by its own(creates from Java constructor)
Lib implamantation and extra tips how to use library could be found on source page: 
AniTexLib
